message:
refactor(cli/adopt): generalize session adoption to support all agent types

Replace the hardcoded cc/cod/gmi/user pane flags with a data-driven
adoptTypeSpec registry that automatically generates CLI flags for all
supported agent types (claude, codex, gemini, cursor, windsurf, aider,
ollama, user).

- Add adoptTypeSpec struct and supportedAdoptTypes slice defining flag
  name, AgentType, description, and example for each supported type
- Replace AdoptOptions.CCPanes/CodPanes/GmiPanes/UserPanes fields with
  a single PaneAssignments map[AgentType][]int
- Dynamically register CLI flags from the spec registry
- Refactor runAdopt and related functions to iterate PaneAssignments
  instead of checking individual fields
- Update examples in command help to show cursor/windsurf/aider/ollama
- Update tests for the new map-based assignment structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
